query: DynamoDB query flexibility and analytics support for real-time analytics
answer: DynamoDB supports real-time analytics through integrations with OpenSearch Service and Singlestore. It lacks native analytics features but can handle flexible querying for transactional workloads. Use third-party tools like Tinybird for enhanced analytics capabilities.

results.title: Is DynamoDB good for analytics? - Quora
results.snippet: The standard answer is - no, it was designed as a transactional database and doesn't support the SQL queries necessary for analytics.
